stonetop.summary: Man-sized flightless pack drakes that crash through the brush.

system.concept: Man-sized flightless pack drakes that crash through the brush.
system.description: Bigger than a grown man, with a yard-long talon on each foot and a boney ridge on their heads they use to go crashing through the undergrowth. They might follow a party for days, waiting for them to let their guard down or for someone to fall behind. Then? Bam. Their feathers are much-sought by merchants — a bundle of drake feathers (fragile, Value 3) can be harvested from a flock of 3-4.
